{{CargoRelic
|name=Lycurgus Cup
|class_id=22536
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=12-13
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Dec 13, 312 AD, the Lycurgus Cup was brought to the table of a nobleman in ancient Rome.<br>The Lycurgus Cup is an ancient Roman-style birdcage cup depicting the story of King Lycurgus from Greek mythology, who was entangled in vines and ultimately died tragically for killing a follower of the god of wine. Its uniqueness lies in the fact that its cup wall changes from green to wine-red under the illumination of light, creating an extremely ornamental effect and making it a one-of-a-kind work of art.
|fame=30
|art=71
|fth=46
|civ=54
|tech=42
|ss1=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +30<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +3<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss2=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +40<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +4<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss3=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +50<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +5<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss4=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +70<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +7<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss5=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +90<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss7=Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail HP +90<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50<br>Snail RUSH +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quantumamp  skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Quantum Amp: Quantum Amp Max Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Quantumamp  skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Quantum Amp: Quantum Amp production +7.5%
}}
